Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Traveler]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Travelers are something Kalman suspects might be responsible for the ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Travelers are entities that can be terrifying to encounter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — The Traveler owns a castle with a tallest tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Travelers have a thousand powers, most of them gruesome and terrible.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — A Traveler captured ten people from Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Travelers are beings that Simon wants to learn how to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Travelers must travel through their own Territories to grow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — To Travel requires risking it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — A Traveler of Helgard or Ornheim summons external things like beasts, weapons, or elemental blasts to destroy enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — A Traveler is a type of person or role.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Travelers possess secrets or abilities that distinguish them.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Petrus is a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Travelers are considered hostile entities.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Travelers can use powers like lightning bolts and fireballs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kathrin is a highly trained and experienced Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Travelers in Avernus live based on tribal affiliations rather than national allegiance.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
